analyzers_disabled.description: Append a non-destructive comment/message to one activity when write tools are enabled. This tool only adds a new message and never overwrites prior messages.

activity_id.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID to append a message/comment to. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

include_full.description: When true, include the raw upstream add-message response under full; default returns a terse append confirmation.

message.description: Required free-text message/comment content. Must be non-empty after trimming; the body is sent as content and is not logged by icuvisor.

analyzers_disabled.name: add_activity_message

outputSchema.description: Append-only activity message confirmation with activity_id, message_id, status, and normalized athlete_id metadata when available.

analyzers_disabled.description: Create or update a non-destructive calendar event such as a planned workout, race, or note. Omitting event_id creates a new event; providing event_id updates that event without deleting or replacing unrelated events.

examples.description: Keep the day flexible; optional mobility only.
examples.name: Travel day

examples.description: B race. Practice breakfast, warm-up, and even pacing.
examples.name: 10K tune-up race

input_examples.description: Keep the day flexible; optional mobility only.
input_examples.name: Travel day

input_examples.description: B race. Practice breakfast, warm-up, and even pacing.
input_examples.name: 10K tune-up race

category.description: Required upstream event category. Documented upstream categories include WORKOUT, RACE_A, RACE_B, RACE_C, NOTE, PLAN, HOLIDAY, SICK, INJURED, SET_EFTP, FITNESS_DAYS, SEASON_START, TARGET, SET_FITNESS; see icuvisor://event-categories. Custom athlete/account category values are passed through.

date.description: Required athlete-local event date as YYYY-MM-DD; interpreted in the configured athlete timezone.

description.description: Optional free-text athlete or coach notes. Preserved verbatim, including whitespace and line breaks; mutually exclusive with workout_doc.

distance_meters.description: Optional planned distance in meters when supported upstream.

elapsed_time_seconds.description: Optional planned elapsed duration in seconds when supported upstream.

event_id.description: Optional upstream event ID to update. Omit to create a new event; this tool never deletes events.

include_full.description: When true, include the raw upstream event payload under event.full; default response matches get_event_by_id's terse event shape.

moving_time_seconds.description: Optional planned moving duration in seconds when supported upstream.

name.description: Optional event title/name shown on the athlete calendar.

tags.description: Optional event tags to preserve on the upstream event, in caller-provided order.

target_load.description: Optional planned training load / TSS equivalent when supported upstream.

type.description: Required for WORKOUT events: upstream sport/activity type such as Ride, Run, Swim, or the athlete account's configured activity type. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

workout_doc.description: Optional structured WorkoutDoc. Mutually exclusive with description; serialized to the upstream workout DSL. Syntax reference: icuvisor://workout-syntax.

analyzers_disabled.name: add_or_update_event

outputSchema.description: Write confirmation containing the same terse event row shape used by get_event_by_id plus operation/date/timezone metadata.

analyzers_disabled.description: Apply a workout-library training plan to the athlete calendar from an anchor start date. Defaults to dry_run:true, fetches plan workouts server-side by plan_id, marks conflicts, and only replaces existing events when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

conflict_policy.description: skip_existing leaves days with calendar conflicts untouched. replace_existing deletes conflicting events before creating plan workouts and is accepted only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

dry_run.description: Safety default is true, even in safe mode. Set dry_run:false explicitly to create or replace calendar events.

plan_id.description: Required workout-library folder/plan ID to fetch server-side. Do not pass plan contents in tool arguments.

start_date.description: Required athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD anchor date; workout day 1 is applied to this date and later plan days are relative to it.

analyzers_disabled.name: apply_training_plan

outputSchema.description: Training-plan apply preview or write result with per-day proposed events, conflict markers, created event rows, and _meta created/skipped/replaced/delete-mode counts.

analyzers_disabled.description: Create one custom item definition. Content is validated against readable samples; see icuvisor://custom-item-schemas for item_type content guidance.

examples.description: Short coach-facing note captured on travel weeks.
examples.name: Travel fatigue note

input_examples.description: Short coach-facing note captured on travel weeks.
input_examples.name: Travel fatigue note

content.description: Required item_type-specific content object. Validated against existing readable custom items before upload; see icuvisor://custom-item-schemas for schema guidance.

description.description: Optional custom item description. Preserved verbatim when supplied.

hide_script.description: Optional upstream hide_script flag for script/formula based custom items.

image.description: Optional upstream image identifier or URL when supported by the custom-item type.

index.description: Optional display/order index for item types that support ordering.

item_type.description: Required upstream custom-item type. The value must match an existing readable schema sample, for example FITNESS_CHART, INPUT_FIELD, ACTIVITY_FIELD, ACTIVITY_STREAM, ACTIVITY_PANEL, ACTIVITY_HISTOGRAM, ACTIVITY_MAP, ACTIVITY_HEATMAP, TRACE_CHART, FITNESS_TABLE, or ZONES.

name.description: Required custom item name. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

visibility.description: Optional upstream visibility value. Omit to use intervals.icu defaults.

analyzers_disabled.name: create_custom_item

outputSchema.description: Create confirmation containing the same full custom_item read shape as get_custom_item_by_id, with content preserved verbatim and schema-validation metadata.

analyzers_disabled.description: Create a reusable workout-library template, not a calendar event. Use description or workout_doc; workout_doc syntax is documented at icuvisor://workout-syntax.

examples.description: 60m easy aerobic endurance. Keep it conversational.
examples.name: Endurance aerobic ride

input_examples.description: 60m easy aerobic endurance. Keep it conversational.
input_examples.name: Endurance aerobic ride

description.description: Optional free-text workout description. Preserved verbatim when workout_doc is omitted; mutually exclusive with workout_doc because intervals.icu accepts one description DSL string on writes.

folder_id.description: Optional intervals.icu workout-library folder or plan ID to place the new template in. Omit to create a top-level library workout.

name.description: Required workout-library template name/title. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

sport.description: Required upstream sport/activity type for the workout template, such as Ride, Run, Swim, VirtualRide, or the athlete account's configured activity type.

tags.description: Optional workout-library tags to preserve on the upstream template, in caller-provided order.

workout_doc.description: Optional structured WorkoutDoc. Mutually exclusive with description; serialized to the upstream workout-description DSL. Syntax reference: icuvisor://workout-syntax.

analyzers_disabled.name: create_workout

outputSchema.description: Create confirmation containing the same terse workout row shape used by workout-library read tools plus operation, source endpoint, sport, and workout_doc upload metadata.

analyzers_disabled.description: Delete one activity by activity_id. This destructive tool has no confirm argument and is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

activity_id.description: Required opaque upstream activity ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

analyzers_disabled.name: delete_activity

outputSchema.description: Delete confirmation with deleted_id, status, and _meta.deleted containing a terse echo of the activity before deletion.

analyzers_disabled.description: Delete one custom item definition by item_id. This destructive tool has no confirm argument and is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

item_id.description: Required opaque upstream custom item ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

analyzers_disabled.name: delete_custom_item

outputSchema.description: Delete confirmation with deleted_id, status, and _meta.deleted containing a terse echo of the custom item before deletion.

analyzers_disabled.description: Delete one calendar event by event_id. This destructive tool has no confirm argument and is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

event_id.description: Required opaque upstream event ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

analyzers_disabled.name: delete_event

outputSchema.description: Delete confirmation with deleted_id, status, and _meta.deleted containing a terse echo of the event before deletion.

analyzers_disabled.description: Delete calendar events in a required athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD start_date/end_date range, optionally filtered by category. Same-day ranges are allowed; ranges must be 31 days or fewer. This destructive tool has no confirm argument and is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

category.description: Optional upstream event category filter. Omit to delete all event categories in the bounded date range.

end_date.description: Required athlete-local end date YYYY-MM-DD. Same-day ranges are allowed; range size is capped at 31 inclusive days.

start_date.description: Required athlete-local start date YYYY-MM-DD. Open-ended ranges are rejected.

analyzers_disabled.name: delete_events_by_date_range

outputSchema.description: Delete confirmation with deleted_ids, _meta.deleted_count, and _meta.deleted terse echoes for events deleted from the bounded athlete-local date range.

analyzers_disabled.description: Delete one gear item by gear_id. This destructive tool has no confirm argument and is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

gear_id.description: Required opaque upstream gear ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

analyzers_disabled.name: delete_gear

outputSchema.description: Delete confirmation with deleted_id, status, and _meta.deleted containing a terse echo of the gear item before deletion.

analyzers_disabled.description: Delete one sport-settings definition by sport_settings_id. This destructive tool has no confirm argument and is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

sport_settings_id.description: Required opaque upstream sport-settings ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

analyzers_disabled.name: delete_sport_settings

outputSchema.description: Delete confirmation with deleted_id, status, and _meta.deleted containing a terse echo of the sport settings before deletion.

analyzers_disabled.description: Delete one reusable workout-library template by workout_id. This destructive tool has no confirm argument and is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

workout_id.description: Required upstream workout-library template ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

analyzers_disabled.name: delete_workout

outputSchema.description: Delete confirmation containing workout_id, status, source endpoint, and common server/delete-mode metadata.

analyzers_disabled.description: List activities for a date range with terse unit-disambiguated rows, Strava-unavailable detection, and opaque pagination. Use this before details, intervals, streams, splits, or messages when a prompt asks about recent training.

include_full.description: When true, include raw upstream activity fields and preserve upstream nulls; default terse rows are unit-disambiguated and null-stripped.

include_unnamed.description: When false, drop rows with an empty activity name after bounded pagination.

newest.description: Optional local ISO-8601 end date/date-time; defaults upstream to now.

next_page_token.description: Opaque token from _meta.next_page_token for the next page. Do not edit.

oldest.description: Required local ISO-8601 start date/date-time unless next_page_token is supplied.

page_size.description: Number of terse rows to return per page; values above 200 are capped.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_activities

outputSchema.description: Paginated activities with unit-disambiguated terse rows, Strava unavailable markers, and _meta.next_page_token when more data may be available.

analyzers_disabled.description: Get one activity's terse metadata and metrics by activity_id. Use include_full only when raw upstream fields are needed; Strava-blocked activities return an unavailable marker instead of sparse N/A rows.

activity_id.description: intervals.icu activity ID.

include_full.description: Include raw upstream fields; default terse mode strips nulls and returns normalized fields.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_activity_details

analyzers_disabled.description: Get analyzed intervals for one activity by activity_id. Interval units are normalized to the canonical intervals.icu unit enum and raw interval payloads require include_full.

activity_id.description: intervals.icu activity ID.

include_full.description: Include raw upstream fields; default terse mode strips nulls and returns normalized fields.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_activity_intervals

analyzers_disabled.description: List comments and notes on one activity by activity_id. Responses are terse by default and render created timestamps in the athlete's configured timezone.

activity_id.description: intervals.icu activity ID whose messages/comments should be listed.

include_full.description: Include raw upstream message fields and preserve nulls.

limit.description: Maximum messages to return; defaults to 100 and is capped at 200.

since_id.description: Return messages after this upstream message ID; zero means no cursor.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_activity_messages

analyzers_disabled.description: Get manual or virtual per-km/per-mile activity splits. Uses manual intervals when present, otherwise derives virtual splits from distance/time streams and honors preferred_units.

activity_id.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID whose manual or virtual splits should be returned.

include_full.description: When true, preserve full response metadata during shaping; split rows remain terse and unit-disambiguated by default.

split_unit.description: Optional split distance unit. Defaults to the athlete's preferred_units when omitted, falling back to km.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_activity_splits

analyzers_disabled.description: Get canonical activity stream channels by activity_id. Streams are heavy: default returns only available stream metadata; include samples only with include_full:true or explicit keys.

activity_id.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID whose stream channels should be listed.

include_full.description: When true, include raw upstream stream payloads and samples for available stream channels; default returns metadata only unless keys is supplied.

keys.description: Optional stream keys to include as samples. Values are canonicalized to snake_case when known; unknown keys are reported in _meta. Supplying keys includes samples even when include_full is false.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_activity_streams

analyzers_disabled.description: Get the configured athlete profile, FTP/thresholds, zones, and sport settings from intervals.icu. Use this for athlete identity, units, timezone, FTP, heart-rate thresholds, pace thresholds, and zone configuration; do not use it for activities, wellness, fitness trends, events, or workouts.

include_full.description: When true, include additional typed, non-secret profile and sport-setting identifiers. Defaults to false; raw upstream payloads and credentials are never returned.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_athlete_profile

outputSchema.description: Terse athlete profile with normalized athlete_id, units, timezone, sport thresholds/zones, and _meta.server_version.

analyzers_disabled.description: Get upstream best efforts grouped by sport and default/requested power, heart-rate, and pace buckets. Defaults to Ride, Run, and Swim with terse bucket rows.

distance_meters.description: Pace distance buckets. Defaults depend on sport: run-style 400,1000,1609,5000,10000m; swim 50,100,200,400,1500m.

duration_seconds.description: Power/HR duration buckets. Defaults to 5,15,30,60,300,1200,3600 seconds.

include_full.description: When true, include raw upstream curve arrays and activity maps.

newest.description: Optional local end date YYYY-MM-DD. Supply with oldest or omit both for all-time.

oldest.description: Optional local start date YYYY-MM-DD. Supply with newest or omit both for all-time.

sports.description: Intervals.icu sports/types to fan out. Defaults to Ride, Run, Swim.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_best_efforts

outputSchema.description: Best efforts grouped by sport and bucket.

analyzers_disabled.description: Fetch one custom item by item_id and preserve its full content payload. For per-item_type content schema guidance, see icuvisor://custom-item-schemas.
analyzers_disabled.name: get_custom_item_by_id

outputSchema.description: Full custom item payload with content preserved verbatim and item_type schema documentation noted in _meta.

analyzers_disabled.description: List custom item definitions such as charts, fields, streams, panels, histograms, maps, and zones. Returns terse rows with id, name, and item_type; use get_custom_item_by_id for the full content payload.

item_type.description: Optional upstream custom-item type filter, for example FITNESS_CHART, INPUT_FIELD, ACTIVITY_FIELD, ACTIVITY_STREAM, ACTIVITY_PANEL, ACTIVITY_HISTOGRAM, ACTIVITY_MAP, ACTIVITY_HEATMAP, TRACE_CHART, FITNESS_TABLE, or ZONES.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_custom_items

outputSchema.description: Terse custom-item rows with id, name, item_type, and metadata counts by item type.

analyzers_disabled.description: Fetch a single calendar event detail by event_id. If the detail endpoint 404s, performs one bounded list scan and returns a structured unavailable result instead of exposing the raw 404.

date.description: Optional athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date hint. On detail 404, scans ±30 days around this date.

event_id.description: Required upstream event ID. Numeric upstream IDs should be passed as strings.

include_full.description: When true, include the raw upstream event payload under event.full; default response is terse.

newest.description: Optional athlete-local scan end YYYY-MM-DD. Must be paired with oldest and span at most 61 days.

oldest.description: Optional athlete-local scan start YYYY-MM-DD. Must be paired with newest and span at most 61 days.

resolve.description: Optional upstream resolve flag for the fallback list scan; defaults to true to recover recurring or derived event instances.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_event_by_id

outputSchema.description: One calendar event as {event,_meta}, or a structured non-error {unavailable,_meta} result when detail 404 plus bounded list scan cannot find the ID.

analyzers_disabled.description: List calendar events across a bounded athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date range. Returns terse rows by default, raw upstream event payloads only with include_full:true, and preserves upstream category enum values.

category.description: Optional upstream event category filter. Documented upstream categories include WORKOUT, RACE_A, RACE_B, RACE_C, NOTE, PLAN, HOLIDAY, SICK, INJURED, SET_EFTP, FITNESS_DAYS, SEASON_START, TARGET, SET_FITNESS; see icuvisor://event-categories. Custom athlete/account category values are passed through.

include_full.description: When true, include each raw upstream event payload under full; default rows are terse and null-stripped.

limit.description: Maximum event rows to request; defaults to 100 and values above 500 are capped.

newest.description: Required athlete-local end date YYYY-MM-DD; date range is capped at 366 days.

oldest.description: Required athlete-local start date YYYY-MM-DD.

resolve.description: Optional upstream resolve flag for recurring/derived events when supported by intervals.icu.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_events

outputSchema.description: Bounded calendar event rows with raw upstream category enum values, date-range metadata, truncation metadata, and optional full raw payloads.

analyzers_disabled.description: Get one activity's upstream-exposed extended metrics by activity_id. Terse mode drops unavailable fields and never computes or zero-fills missing metrics; include_full returns raw upstream payloads.

activity_id.description: Intervals.icu activity ID to fetch extended metrics for.

include_full.description: When true, include raw upstream activity, interval, and power-vs-HR payloads. Default terse mode only returns upstream-exposed metrics and drops unavailable fields.

analyzers_disabled.name: get_extended_metrics

outputSchema.description: Upstream-exposed extended metrics for one activity.

analyzers_disabled.description: Get CTL, ATL, and TSB fitness trends for a local date range. Dates are athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD values.

end_date.description: local end date as YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone.

include_full.description: When true, include raw upstream summary rows.

start_date.description: local start date for fitness rows as YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone.

tools.description: Fetch a single calendar event detail by event_id. If the detail endpoint 404s, performs one bounded list scan and returns a structured unavailable result instead of exposing the raw 404.

date.description: Optional athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date hint. On detail 404, scans ±30 days around this date.

event_id.description: Required upstream event ID. Numeric upstream IDs should be passed as strings.

include_full.description: When true, include the raw upstream event payload under event.full; default response is terse.

newest.description: Optional athlete-local scan end YYYY-MM-DD. Must be paired with oldest and span at most 61 days.

oldest.description: Optional athlete-local scan start YYYY-MM-DD. Must be paired with newest and span at most 61 days.

resolve.description: Optional upstream resolve flag for the fallback list scan; defaults to true to recover recurring or derived event instances.

tools.name: get_event_by_id

outputSchema.description: One calendar event as {event,_meta}, or a structured non-error {unavailable,_meta} result when detail 404 plus bounded list scan cannot find the ID.

tools.description: List calendar events across a bounded athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date range. Returns terse rows by default, raw upstream event payloads only with include_full:true, and preserves upstream category enum values.

category.description: Optional upstream event category filter. Documented upstream categories include WORKOUT, RACE_A, RACE_B, RACE_C, NOTE, PLAN, HOLIDAY, SICK, INJURED, SET_EFTP, FITNESS_DAYS, SEASON_START, TARGET, SET_FITNESS; see icuvisor://event-categories. Custom athlete/account category values are passed through.

include_full.description: When true, include each raw upstream event payload under full; default rows are terse and null-stripped.

limit.description: Maximum event rows to request; defaults to 100 and values above 500 are capped.

newest.description: Required athlete-local end date YYYY-MM-DD; date range is capped at 366 days.

oldest.description: Required athlete-local start date YYYY-MM-DD.

resolve.description: Optional upstream resolve flag for recurring/derived events when supported by intervals.icu.

tools.name: get_events

outputSchema.description: Bounded calendar event rows with raw upstream category enum values, date-range metadata, truncation metadata, and optional full raw payloads.

index.description: Optional replacement display/order index. Omit to leave unchanged.

effective_date.description: Required athlete-local effective date as YYYY-MM-DD; used as the oldest date for upstream sport-setting recompute.

ftp.description: Functional Threshold Power in watts for the selected sport.

zones.description: Optional destructive replacement zone definitions. Supplying zones overwrites prior power/hr/pace zone definitions for this sport and is rejected unless ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

boundaries.description: Ordered zone boundary values: watts for power, bpm for hr, seconds in the sport pace unit for pace.

names.description: Optional zone names; when supplied, length must match boundaries.
